info.title: Matrix Builder API
info.description: Public orchestration API for controlled Matrix Bundle generation.

schema.title: Response Health Api V1 Health Get
Response Ready Api V1 Ready Get
Response Auth Status Api V1 Auth Status Get
Response Verify Session Api V1 Auth Session Verify Post
Response Recent Audit Events Api V1 Audit Recent Get
Response Get Bundle Tree Api V1 Bundles  Bundle Id  Tree Get

ValidationRequest.title: ValidationRequest
ValidationRequest.description:
A generated repo or patch submitted for Matrix contract validation.

This accepts references instead of raw archives so the API can support browser uploads,
object-storage uploads, GitHub PR refs, or local dev fixtures without changing the contract.
